location.office_time_required: 3 days in the office per week

level_signals: 6+ years of experience in Strategy & Operations, Revenue Operations, Management Consulting, or related analytical role
Partners with Enterprise Sales leadership and GTM Strategy & Operations Lead — not leading the function

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 6+ years of experience in Strategy & Operations, Revenue Operations, Business Operations, Management Consulting, Investment Banking, Finance, or a related analytical role.
Are highly analytical and comfortable working with large datasets to generate insights, identify trends, and inform business decisions.
Have experience supporting forecasting, pipeline management, business reviews, performance reporting, or other GTM operating rhythms.
Excel at structuring ambiguous problems, developing practical solutions, and driving execution in fast-paced environments.
Are an effective cross-functional partner who can build relationships and influence stakeholders across Sales, Finance, Product, Data, and Operations teams.
Have strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to create executive-ready materials and clearly articulate recommendations.
Are detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple priorities while maintaining a high bar for quality and execution.
Thrive in collaborative environments and are motivated by helping teams scale, operate more effectively, and achieve ambitious growth goals.

scope.surface: Enterprise GTM Strategy & Operations — supporting Enterprise Sales leadership with planning, performance analysis, forecasting, and cross-functional GTM initiatives
core_responsibilities: Partner closely with Enterprise Sales leadership to support strategic planning, territory and coverage models, growth initiatives, and GTM priorities
Analyze business performance, pipeline health, customer trends, and sales funnel metrics to identify opportunities and inform recommendations
Support forecasting, pipeline reviews, business reviews, and executive reporting
Develop and operationalize GTM growth strategies and strategic bets for new products, customer motions, capabilities, and market opportunities across Enterprise subsegments
Build and improve scalable processes, reporting frameworks, dashboards, and operating cadences
Translate complex data into clear business insights, executive-ready materials, and actionable recommendations for leadership stakeholders
Communicate risks, opportunities, project updates, and key business insights while supporting ad hoc analyses and reporting requests

green_flags: Clear role scope with specific responsibilities listed
High-visibility role partnering directly with Enterprise Sales leadership at a top AI company
Hybrid model is explicit (3 days/week) with relocation assistance offered
Broad function exposure: Sales, Finance, Product, Data, Enablement, Systems
OpenAI is a marquee employer in the AI space with significant growth trajectory
red_flags: Visa sponsorship status not mentioned — unclear for international candidates
Role title says 'GTM Strategy & Operations, Enterprise' but no seniority level (Senior, Lead, etc.) is specified — level ambiguity
All 'must have' criteria framed as 'You might thrive in this role if you' — language is softer than typical hard requirements, creating classification ambiguity

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 6+ years requirement and partnering-vs-leading framing)
scope.business_model (inferred from Enterprise Sales context and OpenAI's known product)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not directly stated in JD)
ambiguities: All requirements are framed under 'You might thrive in this role if you:' — softer than typical 'Required' language, but the items read as baseline expectations. Classified as hard severity given the 6+ years anchor and operational specificity.
Visa sponsorship is not mentioned anywhere in the JD; classified as 'unclear'.
No explicit seniority level (e.g., Senior, Lead) in the role title or body; level inferred from years and reporting relationship to 'GTM Strategy & Operations, Enterprise Lead'.
